_doc: Coverage rules for the 8000-scenario shipper<>driver E2E sweep. Hydrated from eusotrip_shipper_driver_coverage.md (audit) + uber_freight_features.md + cloudtrucks_features.md. Override hierarchy: by_cargo > by_trigger > by_context > default. Severity vocabulary: P0 (business cannot run) / P1 (parity gap) / P2 (QoL) / P3 (future).

default.evidence: loads.create (loads.ts:117); 204_ShipperPostLoad.swift

08.gap_note: Hazmat-7 radioactive RAM-OPS schema fields exist; UI accepts but lacks NRC license validation. UF + CT both N — civilian freight platforms don't validate NRC. We're at parity-or-ahead for hazmat-7 posting.

10.gap_note: Oversized permit + escort flow shipped — bayOps-style posting via 204_PostLoad equipment + hazmat tabs. Per-state permit autoload remains a fast-follow nicety.

06.gap_note: Customs hold at posting phase is N/A — N for all three platforms

default.evidence: loads.search (loads.ts:1788); 010_DriverHome.swift:327 driver search; 280_CatalystDirectory.swift + 213_ShipperCatalystScorecard.swift shipper-side catalyst directory + scorecards via shippers.getCatalystPerformance + shippers.getFavoriteCatalysts.
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. Driver searches available loads via loads.search; shipper browses catalyst directory + scorecards in iOS. Free-text search-by-name on 280 is a fast-follow refinement but the directory grid + favorites surface meets parity.

B.gap_note: Broker-routed discovery: UF Lane Explorer 14d forward, CT Exchange (post-Shipwell)

default.evidence: loadBidding.counter (loadBidding.ts:327); 203_ShipperBids counter-all loop (commit fd48163); DriverCounterInboxView.swift + DriverCounterDetailView (camera-grade design language); MeDetailRoute.counterInbox; loadBidding.getMyBids(status: 'countered') + loadBidding.getBidChain pair-resolver
default.gap_note: EXCLUSIVE LEAD across all 400 scenarios. UF + CT both lack a multi-round counter chain entirely. Driver inbox shows YOUR BID / COUNTER / Δ amount strip + accept / decline CTAs inline + tap-through detail with full chain replay + decline-reason composer.

default.evidence: loadBidding.accept (loads.ts:2586); shippers.acceptBid in 203

07.gap_note: Missed-appointment auto-rebook covered by loadBidding.autoAwardBid (lowest_price / highest_rated / fastest_delivery strategy) plus shippers.acceptBid. Equivalent to UF Auto-Tender; re-tenders to the bid panel without shipper re-touch.

default.evidence: messaging.sendMessage (messaging.ts:215); 311_EsangThread.swift; 053_ESangDispatchChat; RealtimeService.swift WebSocket consumer fed by wsService.broadcastToChannel — bid / load / POD / dispute / eta / safety events all push without polling.
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. WebSocket fan-out in place. ESANG AI dispatcher copilot is a real differentiator vs UF Insights AI (shipper analytics only). Per-load chat thread is fast-follow.

03.gap_note: Mechanical breakdown: ESANG copilot pulls Zeun history + nearest mechanic + ETA impact. UF=N, CT=N. EXCLUSIVE LEAD.

05.gap_note: Accident escalation now real-time via RealtimeService safety:incident:new + emergency:alert handlers

default.evidence: bol.* (bol.ts:299); 226_ShipperDocumentCenter; 228_ShipperBOLs; DriverLoadDocUploadView.swift (camera + doc-type chips + auto-name + tags) wired into 017_PickupBolSigning footer 'Attach extra doc' affordance; documentManagement.uploadDocument(entityType:'load') round-trip; aiDocProcessor available server-side for OCR auto-flag
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. Driver can capture BOL / rate-con / insurance / customs photos inline at pickup. Shipper sees them on the same load envelope. UF lacks OCR-based BOL parsing; once aiDocProcessor auto-flag wires in (next firing), this slice flips to EXCLUSIVE LEAD.

06.gap_note: Hazmat-3 shipping papers (UN+PG+placard verification) wire through but lack carrier-shipper signature chain

08.gap_note: Hazmat-7 radioactive needs NRC dual-signature chain + DOT/AEA cross-check; nobody implements this

default.evidence: fmcsa.getCarrier (fmcsa.ts:123); 216_ShipperCompliance; 011_PretripDVIR; loads.getAssignedDriverReadiness (loads.ts) RBAC-gated join procedure surfacing HOS + insurance + hazmat + TWIC days-remaining + readiness score 0-100; LoadsAPI.DriverReadiness iOS wrapper; driverReadinessCard rendered between carrierCard and documentsRow on 205_ShipperLoadDetail.
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. Shipper sees pre-pickup driver eligibility envelope server-evaluated: HOS clock + 3 cert expiries + carrier safety. Tile severity (CLEAR/WATCH/WARN/EXPIRED) keyed off *DaysRemaining and HOS canDrive. Empty-load envelope renders honest 'no driver yet' state. RBAC: shipper-of-record + ADMIN/SUPER_ADMIN/DISPATCH only — others rejected with 'Not authorized'.

06.gap_note: Hazmat endorsement validity check ships via getAssignedDriverReadiness hazmatDaysRemaining + readinessFlag 'hazmat_warn' / 'hazmat_lapsed'.

08.gap_note: Hazmat-7 needs NRC license + dosimetry pull. Neither UF nor CT ships civilian-freight NRC chain-of-custody. Vertical specialty for a future EusoTrip Hazmat-7 Pro tier.

10.gap_note: HOS-violation-risk now visible to shipper on driverReadinessCard via hosDrivingRemainingHours + hosCanDrive; readinessFlag 'hos_blocked' / 'hos_warn'.

default.evidence: telemetry.getLiveLocation (telemetry.ts:109); 222_ShipperLiveTracking.swift
default.gap_note: Polling at 60-90s on iOS; UF Top Carrier requires 85% automated tracking compliance (we exceed). CT has no shipper-side tracking surface.

02.gap_note: Weather delay → in-app HERE-routed reroute + ESANG nudge. UF carrier app has no native truck-routed nav (relies on 3rd-party GPS). LEAD.

03.gap_note: Mechanical breakdown → Zeun roadside dispatch + mechanic network + DVIR feedback. UF=N (no Zeun-equivalent), CT=N (exited). EXCLUSIVE LEAD.

04.gap_note: Traffic / road closure auto-recompute via HERE truck-routing; UF lacks native truck nav. LEAD.

05.gap_note: Accident → Zeun roadside + accidents.ts incident chain. UF carrier-side accident tooling thin.

default.evidence: appointments.create / update / updateStatus (appointments.ts:114, 177, 195); new appointments.assignDock + appointments.getByLoad procedures (Phase 10 closure); 015_AtGateAwaitingDock fires updateStatus 'checked_in', 016_PickupLoading fires 'loading', 024_Unloading fires 'unloading' on .task hydrate; 205_ShipperLoadDetail action-menu 'Assign dock' opens an inline composer wired to assignDock; iOS AppointmentsAPI.getByLoad + assignDock + updateStatus wrappers.
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. Lifecycle screens round-trip appointments.* status. Shipper assigns dock from iOS — writes the column directly (no longer overloading notes). UF Scheduling API GA was the prior parity benchmark; we close it on iOS without an SSC integration.

04.gap_note: Petroleum tanker bayOps (connectHose, discharge, disconnect) wired in iOS bayOps router. UF + CT both N — no in-app yard ops or tanker-specific bay flow. EXCLUSIVE LEAD.

05.gap_note: Chemical tanker bayOps same as petroleum. EXCLUSIVE LEAD.

07.gap_note: Missed-appointment status flips via appointments.updateStatus 'no_show'; lifecycle hydrate keeps server in sync

default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. Driver-side POD camera + signature pad ships in-app. UF lands POD 5-7 business days; ours is same-second. CT has no shipper-side approval surface.

08.gap_note: Doc defect on POD: aiDocProcessor + aiRateConReader exist; UF=N for OCR-based BOL parsing; CT=N. Driver POD capture screen ships AND pod.rejectPOD now fans out via RealtimeService → driver re-captures without polling. EXCLUSIVE LEAD.
Hazmat-7 POD needs NRC chain-of-custody signatures + final dosimetry log. UF + CT both N — civilian freight platforms don't implement NRC integration.

default.evidence: disputes.ts router (list/getById/respond/escalate); DisputesAPI iOS wrapper; DisputeListView + DisputeDetailView in Components/DisputeViews.swift; reachable from 320 Shipper Me INTEL group AND MeDetailRoute.disputes for driver. Unified envelope across detention / accessorial / demurrage / settlement strands; evidence/message thread with side-aware bubbles; respond + escalate CTAs both wired with audit logging.

Future migration (0042_disputes.sql) can promote the unified envelope into a first-class disputes table; router contract stays stable.

default.evidence: ratings.submit (ratings.ts:155); RatingPromptView.swift one-sheet bidirectional; 025_Paperwork.swift driver-rates-shipper after delivery; 227_ShipperSettlementDetail.swift shipper-rates-driver after settlement clears. Backend amendment to earnings.getSettlementById ships loadId scalar so the shipper-side prompt can derive the load anchor required by the server's one-rating-per-from/to/load constraint.
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED both sides. Driver rates shipper from 025 paperwork. Shipper rates driver from 227 settlement detail (gated on paid/completed status to avoid skewing payment-promptness axis). 5-tap stars + 4-axis breakdown + 500-char comment + anonymous toggle. Server rejects duplicate (fromUser × toUser × loadId) tuples.

default.evidence: loadTemplates.create (loadTemplates.ts:105); loads.createFromTemplate (loads.ts:2968); LoadTemplatesAPI.create + LoadsAPI.createFromTemplate iOS wrappers; ShipperRecurringComposer.swift (lane + cargo + schedule + pricing + Mon-Sun preferred-days chips) wired into 221 'New recurring schedule' CTA AND detail-sheet 'Schedule next pickup' CTA via eusoShipperRecurringScheduleInline notification.
default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED on shipper side. UF Power Lane equivalent shipped in-app. Composer creates the template + materializes the first occurrence in one round-trip — the load lands on the available board the moment the sheet dismisses. Driver-side recurring-inbox is fast-follow (driver sees scheduled loads via the existing 010_DriverHome available-loads feed once shipper materializes them).

default.gap_note: PARITY ACHIEVED. Driver sees 5-tile compliance dashboard with severity coloring (CLEAR/WATCH/WARN/EXPIRED) on every renewable cert. Shipper sees fleet-level FMCSA + insurance status. PushService safety channel still fires for breaking events.
